{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Swarm-Queen Esh’kinaar's carapace
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Relics of the [[Swarm-Queen]] [[Esh’kinaar]] include crossed [[scythe]]-like spines, one black and one rainbow colored.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
